name: Python AI Development
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p ~/.zsh && git clone https://github.com/sindresorhus/pure.git ~/.zsh/pure && git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting.git ~/.zsh/zsh-syntax-highlighting && git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions ~/.zsh/zsh-autosuggestions && make install
